title: SOUN Earnings: SoundHound Stock Slides despite 52% Q1 Revenue Growth
text: SoundHound AI reported strong Q1 2026 earnings with 52% revenue growth reaching $44.2 million, driven by robust demand for voice and agentic AI solutions. The company's automotive and IoT segments showed particularly strong organic growth of 88%, excluding acquisition impacts. Despite impressive revenue metrics, the stock initially declined following the announcement as investors focused on profitability challenges and cash burn. The company reported a GAAP loss of $0.11 per share against analyst expectations of $0.10 loss. Operating margin remained negative at -51.3% as the company continues investing in growth and technology development. Management remains confident in the company's trajectory, highlighting multiple growth drivers across automotive, restaurant, enterprise, and emerging IoT applications. The LivePerson acquisition represents a strategic expansion into digital messaging to complement voice capabilities.
